1.name: Tea Gift Voucher
1.description:
Voucher issued by NLCH, used to redeem delicious tea snacks
But… where’s NLCH’s shop anyway?
1.ability:
Can be fed to gacha machine without damage to trigger a pull
Always gives an 11-pull with at least one gold ball
2.name: Adventurer’s Handbook
2.subtitle: "Written by RORO, begun on 2024/10/1"
2.description:
It began as a casual journal by an adventurer named RORO 
Over time, more people who found it fun joined and added notes
and thus this curious guidebook—covering everything from
‘How to Enter the Dungeon’ to ‘What to Eat for Dinner’—was born
2.ability: Lets you browse the in-game guide
3.name: Junk
3.description:
Various scraps, useless
Why did I even pick this up?
4.name: 10 Yen
4.description:
Just a coin worth 10 Yen
But… it can’t buy anything at all!
5.name: 50 Yen
5.description:
Just a coin worth 50 Yen
Still seems like it buys nothing… but losing it would still hurt
6.name: 100 Yen
6.description:
Just a coin worth 100 Yen
With a bit of luck, it might be enough to buy 
\str[120]’s favorite strawberry milk
7.name: 500 Yen
7.description:
Just a coin worth 500 Yen
If it goes into the gacha… maybe—just maybe—
it’ll hit a legendary Item pull…!
8.name: 1000 Yen
8.description:
Just a 1000 Yen banknote
No one knows why even monsters have started 
collecting human money…
9.name: 5000Yen
9.description:
Just a 5000 Yen banknote
Anyone who sees it can’t help but feel moved—
is this the power of money…?
10.name: 10000 Yen
10.description:
Just a 10000 Yen banknote
Even a gacha machine would smile at such value—
11.name: 50000 Yen
11.description:
A thick stack of 5000 Yen banknotes
As the maid Bunnys rapidly expand trade
monsters have also begun snatching adventurers’ wallets
just to experience this thing called 'shopping'
12.name: 100000 Yen
12.description:
A thick stack of 10000 Yen banknotes
Its scent of wealth can even make 
greedy demons smile seductively—
13.name: Bunny Map
13.description:
A map used by maid bunnies, still covered in carrot crumbs
They dig Rabbit Holes and zip around—almost like a delivery crew
Since that devilish, sharp-minded leader appeared ten years ago
the bunnies took over the Abyss and started trading with monsters
13.ability: Allows you to view the Abyss map and all interactive objects
14.name: Magic Camera
14.description:
Said to be an Eastern artifact, exquisitely crafted yet lost
in the Abyss... It freezes scenes into images, but it’s
easily affected by magic, sometimes capturing strange things
14.ability: Press F7 to take a photo
15.name: JoyStation V
15.subtitle:
"Even at the fifth generation, soul-materialization limits still prevent
 players from directly diving their consciousness."
15.description:
A strange entertainment device recreated by alchemists from 
ancient text fragments. It’s well known among adventurers.
but its complex manufacturing process keeps it extremely rare.
16.name: Shadow Souls DLC
16.description:
An expansion pack for Shadow Souls.
A work confidently released by the knight after interviewing 
a large number of adventurers and their experiences.
Packed with brutally difficult monsters and stages,
yet players flock to it nonetheless…
17.name: \str[120]’s Ahoge
17.description:
An ahoge quietly plucked from \str[120]’s head,
seemingly without her noticing… Even separated from its owner,
it stubbornly stands upright thanks to its inexplicable elasticity.
18.name: Rubber Ducky
18.description:
A rubber duck toy inexplicably left all alone in the river channel.
Perhaps out of a sudden surge of sympathy, it was picked up.
\str[120] will probably like it, though…
19.name: Electric Fan
19.description:
A small electric fan with an outdated model and rather weak airflow.
But compared to it, using cooling magic is far more costly…
20.name: Philosopher's Fragment
20.subtitle:
"Haec est totius fortitudinis fortitudo fortis,  
quia vincet omnem rem subtilem, omnemque solidam penetrabit."
20.description: Even just a fragment contains immense power—
23.name: Delicious Milk
23.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
23.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
24.name: Carrot Milk
24.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
24.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
25.name: Strawberry Milk
25.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
25.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
26.name: Melon Milk
26.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
26.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
27.name: Banana Milk
27.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
27.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
30.name: Pink Konpeito
30.subtitle: "Fufufu... Better not to know the ingredients~♥"
30.description:
Delicately crafted konpeitō handmade by the Archdemon
Gives off a peach-like aroma that makes you dizzy just smelling it…
30.ability: Makes your whole body feel hot after eating!
31.name: Blue Konpeito
31.subtitle: "Fufufu... Better not to know the ingredients~♥"
31.description:
Delicately crafted konpeitō handmade by the Archdemon
Gives off a blueberry-like aroma that brings calm just smelling it…
31.ability: Brings a sense of calm after eating...
32.name: Green Konpeito
32.subtitle: "Fufufu... Better not to know the ingredients~♥"
32.description:
Delicately crafted konpeitō handmade by the Archdemon
Gives off a melon-like aroma that lifts you up just smelling it…
33.name: Springy Mizumanju
33.subtitle: "Fufufu... Better not to know the ingredients~♥"
33.description:
Handcrafted by an Archdemon, bouncy, refreshing Mizumanju
Hits like a shock the moment it touches your tongue!
35.name: NLCH's Cola(L)
35.subtitle: "Sponsored by:NLCH"
35.description:
A drink from a strange vending machine
Never mind the taste, why is there a vending machine?
35.ability: Violent shaking may trigger a powerful explosion
42.name: Kenaz
42.subtitle: "Power of Explosion"
42.description:
A stone engraved with magic runes, designed so even novices with 
no knowledge of magic can easily activate its effect
42.ability:
Throws and turns the target it touches into a bomb
Detonates in 5s, with larger targets causing a wider blast
43.name: Ansuz
43.subtitle: "Power of Revelation"
43.description:
A stone engraved with magic runes, designed so even novices with 
no knowledge of magic can easily activate its effect
43.ability:
Leaves a text-marked sign at the location when used
After updating, the sign becomes visible to other players
44.name: Raido
44.subtitle: "Power of Riding"
44.description:
A stone engraved with magic runes, designed so even novices with 
no knowledge of magic can easily activate its effect
44.ability: Throws a marker that allows position swapping
45.name: Ehwaz
45.subtitle: "Power of Change"
45.description:
A stone engraved with magic runes, designed so even novices with 
no knowledge of magic can easily activate its effect
45.ability: Throws and swaps positions with the target it touches
46.name: The Fool
46.subtitle: "The endless curiosity of a foolish adventurer"
46.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
46.ability: used forcibly teleports you to a random map
48.name: The High Priestess
48.subtitle: "May you receive her favor..."
48.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
48.ability: When used, summons a gate leading to the Fallen Church
50.name: The Emperor
50.subtitle: "The dragon's majesty, inviolable"
50.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
50.ability: Used Dragon's Roar to stuns all enemies on screen
52.name: The Lovers
52.subtitle: "The Witch’s Lingering Scent"
52.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
52.ability: When used, summons monsters and drives them berserk briefly
53.name: Chariot
53.subtitle: "At your service! Hell Express!"
53.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
53.ability: When used, a NLCH truck slams into the player
54.name: Strength
54.subtitle: "Unleash the power of the Giant God Soldier"
54.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
56.name: The Wheel of Fortune
56.subtitle: "Soul-Gambling Roulette"
56.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
56.ability: When used, Grants a random buff or debuff
57.name: Justice
57.subtitle: "Ashes to ashes, dust to dust"
57.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
57.ability: When used, removes all statuses from the player
59.name: Death
59.subtitle: "The goal of all life is death"
59.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
59.ability: When used, the Death Devil’s power manifests here
60.name: Temperance
60.subtitle: "Pandora's Box of the Abyss"
60.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
60.ability: When used, summons a gacha machine
62.name: The Tower
62.subtitle: "Invitation to the Abyssal Feast"
62.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
62.ability: When used, summons the Sealed Pillar
63.name: The Star
63.subtitle: "The star is the guiding beacon home"
63.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
63.ability: Summons a Star Door near the player to return to start
65.name: The Sun
65.subtitle: "Rebirth from the ashes"
65.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
65.ability: Grants the Blessing of the Firebird upon use
67.name: The World
67.subtitle: "Invites you to the mysterious miniature garden world..."
67.description:
A magic card imbued with spells. Designed so
even novices can easily activate its effects
67.ability: Resets the countdown for drop-related events upon use
70.name: Jack Bomb
70.subtitle: "Look over here...!"
70.description:
An alchemical bomb infused with frenzied fire elements
Due to its highly unstable nature, it will detonate immediately
just by holding it
It’ll explode instantly in hot environments!
71.name: Frost Jack Bomb
71.subtitle: "Look over here...!"
71.description:
An alchemical bomb infused with frigid ice elements
Due to its highly unstable nature, it will detonate immediately
just by holding it
72.name: Venom Jack Bomb
72.subtitle: "Look over here...!"
72.description:
An alchemical bomb infused with lethal poison
Due to its highly unstable nature, it will detonate immediately
just by holding it
75.name: Sealed Timepiece
75.description:
A special magical artifact inscribed with a sealing spell
When shattered, it activates its effect, causing everything
within a certain range—including time itself—to come to a halt
76.name: Ginkela
76.description:
A strange feed of unknown origin, said to taste surprisingly good
Its aroma lures not only animals but even monsters!
Handle with care—the scent fades quickly if not stored well
76.ability: When thrown, it creates a scent cloud that draws in monsters
77.name: Sushi Pudding
77.description:
A familiar belonging to a certain Archdemon
Releasing it will reveal the demon's location
Is it a cat, a piece of sushi, or a pudding?
Regardless of its true form, it looks tasty!
80.name: Sealing Scroll
80.description:
A secret tool passed down solely among ninja
Activating the Curse Marks opens a spatial rift, sealing items within
Those items can be summoned again whenever the need arises
80.ability:
Seal or summon all currently equipped item
\str[110]
88.name: Bird Leg Meat
88.description:
Thigh meat harvested from various birds
The meat is tender and plump,
making it perfect for meat dishes
89.name: Large Beast Meat
89.description:
Fresh meat carved from a monster. Delicious meat dishes can
be made from it. Monsters eat people, and people eat monsters
This is the natural order
90.name: Small Beast Meat
90.description:
Fresh meat carved from a monster. Delicious meat dishes can
be made from it. Monsters eat people, and people eat monsters
This is the natural order
97.name: WaterWeird Mucus
97.description:
Mucus secreted by a WaterWeird, commonly used as a general
ingredient in alchemy
It is sometimes also used as a lubricant
98.name: Walking Mushrooms
98.description:
A mushroom from Walking Mushroom, now immobile
When sliced, it looks just like a regular mushroom
100.name: Slime Mucus
100.description:
Mucus secreted by a slime, commonly used as a general
ingredient in alchemy
It is sometimes also used as a lubricant
101.name: Apple
101.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
102.name: Curry Block
102.description:
A spicy curry block made from exotic spices
Pairs well with rice and can be added to various ingredients
103.name: White Rice
103.description:
Simple yet comforting white rice
Can be eaten plain or combined with various ingredients
104.name: Carrot
104.description:
A common vegetable, but it's strange to find it in the abyss
Needs proper preparation before eating
105.name: Potato
105.description:
A common vegetable, but it's strange to find it in the abyss
Needs proper preparation before eating
106.name: Red Chili Pepper
106.description:
A common vegetable, but it's strange to find it in the abyss
Needs proper preparation before eating
107.name: Tomato
107.description:
A common vegetable, but it's strange to find it in the abyss
Needs proper preparation before eating
108.name: Banana
108.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
109.name: Strawberry
109.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
110.name: Grape
110.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
111.name: Pineapple
111.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
112.name: Watermelon
112.description:
Freshly picked fruit, full of refreshing flavor
Eating it directly slightly restores health
113.name: Spaghetti
113.description:
Springy, elastic noodles that go well with any dish
Delicious with just a bit of sauce
114.name: Tomato Sauce
114.description:
Made from tomatoes, with a tangy and sweet flavor
It's best not to think about why monster would drop this
115.name: Wheat Flour
115.description: Flour made from ground wheat, useful for various dishes
116.name: Oyster Mushroom
116.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
117.name: Shiitake
117.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
118.name: Beech Mushroom
118.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
119.name: Lilac Mushroom
119.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
120.name: Moonlight Mushroom
120.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
121.name: Bamboo Mushroom
121.description:
A common mushroom often seen outside
However, finding it in the abyss is quite unusual
122.name: ASABA's Strawberry
122.subtitle: "Mmm… strawberries… my strawberries…"
122.description:
ASABA’s most treasured, high-quality strawberry that it can’t bear
to eat. But even after desperately guarding it until the very end
it still ends up as nothing more than a trophy—
127.name: Octopus tentacles
127.description:
Broken octopus tentacles fished from the sea, they smell great when grilled
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
130.name: Sea Bream
130.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
131.name: Tuna
131.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
132.name: Striped Beakfish
132.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
133.name: Grouper
133.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
134.name: Pacific Saury
134.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
135.name: Sweet shrimp
135.description:
Freshly caught shrimp from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
136.name: Spiny lobster
136.description:
Freshly caught lobster from the sea, be careful not to get pinched
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
137.name: Hairy crab
137.description:
Freshly caught crab from the sea, be careful not to get pinched
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
139.name: X△X
139.description:
A Sacabambaspis that lost its vitality after being caught in an explosion
It probably never imagined that its wish to 'see land' would be 
fulfilled in this way...
142.name: Salmon
142.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
143.name: King Salmon
143.description:
Freshly caught from the sea, perfect for sashimi
It can also be cooked with other ingredients
151.name: Beast Meat
151.description:
Meat taken from a monster. It can be used to make delicious dishes
Monsters eat humans, and humans eat monsters—it's only natural
153.name: A Large Egg
153.description:
A huge egg from the abyss. What creature is it from?
I didn't think too much—an egg is an egg
173.name: Banana fairy
175.name: Apple fairy
185.name: Personal Jesus
185.subtitle: "Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap..."
185.description:
A wicked curiosity crafted by an Archdemon after observing
human civilization Every sin of the bearer is faithfully
recorded and converted into points These points can then
be offered to the demon in exchange for unholy favors—
185.ability: Records sins as points. enables Demonic Trading
187.name: Old Videotape
187.description:
A special medium that stores footage from a bygone era, playable
only with specific equipment. Some propose it was an alchemical
product of an ancient civilization, though no proof exists
Its scarcity also makes collectors highly eager to obtain it
188.name: Horror Videotape
188.description:
A special medium that stores footage from a bygone era, playable
only with specific equipment. Some propose it was an alchemical
product of an ancient civilization, though no proof exists
It also seems cursed—the footage is always unnervingly chilling
189.name: Adult Videotape
189.description:
A special medium that stores footage from a bygone era, playable
only with specific equipment. Some propose it was an alchemical
product of an ancient civilization, though no proof exists
It seems to be restricted content, filled with arousing scenes
190.name: Yuri Doujinshi
190.subtitle: "Onee-chan... I feel like... I can’t live without you anymore..."
190.description:
A doujinshi with beautiful art.
But it depicts a forbidden love between two beautiful girls...
Story’s so steamy, even the pages give off a faint pink scent.
191.name: Moe Doujinshi
191.subtitle: "Moe moe kyun~♡"
191.description:
A doujinshi filled with pink bubbles and heart-shaped effects.
Characters blush and get flustered over the tiniest things...
They say you might end up sighing "so moe~" after reading it.
192.name: Catgirl Doujinshi
192.subtitle: "Master... nya~ Can I get some headpats?"
192.description:
A doujinshi that smells faintly of catnip.
Shows catgirls purring, rolling, and wagging their tails.
May make you consider getting a talking nyan-wife...
197.name: Elixir Rubrum
197.subtitle:
"Haec est totius fortitudinis fortitudo fortis,  
quia vincet omnem rem subtilem, omnemque solidam penetrabit."
197.description:
The reddened Philosopher's Fragment flows like blood
Its proper use is still unknown, but for now, 
just try drinking it like a beverage…
198.name: \str[120]'s T-shirt
198.subtitle: "Knight-sama...! It even has an autograph on it...!"
198.description:
A bonus T-shirt obtained from the Knight, 
now used as pajamas by \str[120].
The loose fit gives her an air of defenseless temptation.
To avoid washing it, she only wears it when in high spirits.
199.name: \str[120]'s Free Pass
199.subtitle: "There are lots of doodles and scribbles all over the pass..."
199.description:
A handmade Free Pass drawn by \str[120]. \str[121] may seek 
\str[120]'s affection — no matter how selfish the request, it’s granted
Even so, \str[120] has always wanted to do something nice for 
\str[121], with or without the pass—
200.name: Polaroid#1
200.subtitle: "What are you doing, staring over here like that…!"
200.description:
Photos capturing the daily lives of the Tea Party girls…
but who took these pictures?
201.name: Polaroid#2
201.subtitle: "this is just how rabbits show affection~"
201.description:

but who took these pictures?

222.subtitle: "Your New Year's wish came true right away, happy?"
222.description:
Photos capturing the daily lives of the Tea Party girls…
but who took these pictures?
223.name: Polaroid#24
223.subtitle: "Did you feel the bunny's love~♥"
223.description:
Photos capturing the daily lives of the Tea Party girls…
but who took these pictures?

224.subtitle: "A strange bunny has been abandoned..."

225.subtitle: "Almost got caught..."

but who took these pictures?

226.subtitle: "Coming in without knocking... what are you up to~♥"
226.description:

227.subtitle: "That's strange... I can't seem to fasten it..."
227.description:

228.subtitle: "...No one's watching over here, right?"

229.subtitle: "Hehe~♥ Nothing happened, okay?"

230.subtitle: "Mmm... The tea tastes even sweeter now...!"
230.description:

231.subtitle: "I know it's part of the job, but just this once, okay?"

232.subtitle: "P-Please don't touch the merchandise carelessly!"

311.name: Blue Radiant Stone
311.description:
A blue gemstone with a captivating glow
While lacking practical value, someone might pay a high price for it…
or have other intentions?
312.name: Small Mana Gel
312.description:
A jelly-like substance formed purely from condensed mana
It’s edible, but its taste varies greatly with one’s magical aptitude
Its main use is as a consumable material for magic
314.name: Red Rhomboid Stone
314.description:
A red gemstone with a captivating glow
While lacking practical value, someone might pay a high price for it…
or have other intentions?
315.name: Neko's Fine Slip
315.description:
A fine slip received after being beaten on the spot for taking goods 
without permission. Sure, I was the one who acted first, but after 
getting roughed up, some of the money on me was forcibly taken as well.
This way of handling things feels pretty brutal…
320.name: Hellstone
320.subtitle:
"The first adventurer to mine it and bring it out was named Kyurame.
He refused to have it named after himself because it sounded too chuuni—"
320.description:
A special ore found only in the deeper layers of the Abyss.
It contains searing mana, yet is exceptionally hard, 
and can only be mined and processed by specific means.
